use_cases: Displaying warning states in application dashboards or error pages
Illustrating alert conditions in empty states or onboarding flows
Adding animated warning visual cues to notifications or feedback messages
Enhancing form validation UI with animated warning graphics
Creating attention-grabbing warning callouts in landing pages or marketing sites
ai_summary: An animated SVG warning triangle graphic with path-drawing animations using Framer Motion. Features a golden yellow color scheme with corner path lines, triangle outline, and corner rectangles that animate in sequence. Supports configurable animation speed, motion preference detection for accessibility, and customizable dimensions and colors. Ideal for warning states, error pages, and alert illustrations in SaaS and fintech applications.
